content:
This is an **Arc 1** (Forgotten Chapters) specific Tier List, explaining all of the characters' performance and playstyles at earlygame (up to the middle of  Ch 7), later/hard Arc 1 content, as well as high score Phantasmal Dive. Then I rate based on those three factors considered equally. This is mostly a long audio video, so thanks if you choose to listen or skim through it. <:M_satisfy:1400771690321154110> 
https://youtu.be/Y-c1iF-OeDM?si=jO5DHbVLqRj_bmWM

embeds.title: An Exceedingly Brief Arc 1 Morimens Tier List
embeds.description:
A very short video retrospective and ranking on my experiences with all of the characters in Morimens Arc 1 "Forgotten Chapters" after over a year and several hundred hours of playing the game. Tier List is ONLY based on Arc 1 performance!!!
00:00 Introduction

content:
I've been working on short overviews of characters and mechanics. I have a few now, but this is my first. A 60 second overview of Daffodil. These are mostly to introduce the Awakener, and right now don't talk about high tier utility or over-exaltation.
https://youtube.com/shorts/Jq3I8mnisaM?si=1z1UDeqdek7Srr29

embeds.title: Morimens: Daffodil Overview #morimens #animehorrorgame #lovecraftia...
embeds.description:
The first of a new series, I'll be providing quick overviews of the Awakeners in Morimens!
Anime + Lovecraftian cosmos makes for a memorable gameplay experience. The characters are beautifully rendered and the story is far darker than I was anticipating. This is a very fun and intriguing card battle

content:
A summary of every Aequor Realm awakener. This is meant to be a description of what they generally do, how they play, what enlightens they require, and anything else a new player might want to know. This is the first in a 4 part series that will provide the same overview for all realms.
https://youtu.be/ZFrfuyPIJBg

embeds.title: A Summary of Aequor: A Simple Guide to Every Blue Awaker
embeds.description:
This is meant to be a new player guide to every (current) Aequor Awakener
Topics covered:
Enlightens, card effects, general play patterns, availability
